title: Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi
tagline: Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Adaikala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi is a Catholic church located in the village of Elakurichi near Ariyalur, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Adaikala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi is a Catholic church located in the village of Elakurichi near Ariyalur, Tamil Nadu, India. The church is dedicated to Our Lady of Refuge, also known as Adaikkala Madha in the Tamil language.

topPlaces.name: Elakurichi
topPlaces.description: Elakkurichi is a small village in Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, South India, and a Catholic pilgrimage center dedicated to Virgin Mary. It is 20km from Thanjavur.

topPlaces.name: Devangudi
topPlaces.description: Devangudi is a village near Thiruvaiyaru in Thanjavur district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is situated between two principal waterways of South India: the Cauveri River, two kilometers to the north, and the Kollidam River, less than one kilometer to its south.

topPlaces.name: Pattukudi
topPlaces.description: Pattukudi is a small village near Ayyampettai in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is administered by the Puthur Panchayat Board of Papanasam taluk, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Alagiyamanavalam
topPlaces.description: Alagiyamanavalam is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Melaramanallur, an island hamlet located on Kollidam River, is a part of Alagiyamanavalam Revenue Village and Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kamarasavalli
topPlaces.description: Kamarasavalli is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Chinnapattakadu
topPlaces.description: Chinnapattakadu is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Chinnapattakadu is a small Village/hamlet in Thirumanur Block in Ariyalur District of Tamil Nadu State, India.

topPlaces.name: Ganapathi Agraharam
topPlaces.description: Ganapathi Agraharam is a small village of Papanasam Taluk, in the district of Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, India. It is famous for its panoramic beauty of agricultural fields and the river Cauvery flowing amidst them.

topPlaces.name: Dayanidheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Dayanidheeswarar Temple (ஸ்ரீ தயாநிதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vadakurangaduthurai in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India dedicated to the Hindu God Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi?
faq.a: Stays in Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adaikkala Madha Shrine, Elakurichi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Elakurichi, Devangudi, Pattukudi, Alagiyamanavalam, Kamarasavalli.
